title: Announcement of the Turkish Proficiency Exam for the Fall Semester of the 2025-2026 Academic Year
content:
Announcement of the Turkish Proficiency Exam for the Fall Semester of the 2025-2026 Academic Year

Turkish Proficiency Exam:

For students who will be enrolled in the Turkish Preparatory Class in the 2025-2026 Academic Year, the Turkish Proficiency Exam will be held on September 20, 2025, at 10:30 a.m. in classroom A217.

The results of the Turkish Proficiency Exam will be announced on September 21, 2025, at 6:00 p.m. in the "Announcements" section of our university’s website.

Note:

Students taking the exam must be present at the exam venue no later than 10:20 a.m.

It is strictly required that you bring

your student ID, an eraser, and a pencil

with you to the exam.
